articles.title: Ethereum Risks Falling To Sub $2,900 Price Level as Bulls Start to Retreat
articles.description: Ethereum’s (ETH) price peaked at $3,443 on Tuesday and has since witnessed a correction. It currently trades at $3,063 at press time, losing 3% of its value over the past 24 hours. With waning bullish sentiments, the Ethereum coin price risks a potential dip toward the $2,900 price level. This analysis explains why this scenario may play out in the short term. articles.description: Ripple’s native crypto, XRP, turned out to be the biggest gainer among the top 100 cryptos breaching the much awaited $0.80 price level.
